[Congressional Bills 104th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 46 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                In the House of Representatives, U. S.,

                                                      January 27, 1995.
    Resolved, That the following Member be elected to the following committee:
    Committee on International Relations: Victor O. Frazer, Virgin Islands, 
(Delegate).
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
